occurrence_sentence: NTT Research, a division of NTT (TYO:9432), today announced that scientists from its Physics & Informatics (PHI) Lab have achieved quantum control of exciton wavefunctions in two-dimensional (2D) semiconductors.

NTT Research, a division of NTT (TYO:9432), today announced that scientists from its Physics & Informatics (PHI) Lab have achieved quantum control of exciton wavefunctions in two-dimensional (2D) semiconductors.

PRESS RELEASE —[](https://ntt-research.com/), a division of[ NTT](https://group.ntt/en/) (TYO:9432), today announced that scientists from its[ Physics & Informatics (PHI) Lab](https://ntt-research.com/phi/) have achieved quantum control of exciton wavefunctions in two-dimensional (2D) semiconductors.
